page: Microsoft Azure L16as_v3 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the LASv3 family. It is powered by an AMD EPYC 7763 processor featuring 16 dedicated vCPUs, which map to 8 physical cores with 2 threads per core. The processor operates at a clock speed of 3.525 GHz and includes a 32 MB L3 cache. The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core. Storage is bundled, featuring 4004 GB of local storage that is Premium Storage capable.

Benchmark evaluations indicate a strong single-core CPU performance, placing in the top 25% under stress-ng testing. Multi-core CPU performance and Geekbench scores fall within the average range. Memory bandwidth tests show average read-only performance for both small and large blocks, but write performance for large blocks is weak, falling into the bottom 25%. The server demonstrates strong performance in text generation for small language models, while medium model inference and static web serving throughput remain average.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the L16as_v3 offers a high density of local storage and memory relative to its compute resources, making it a viable option for workloads requiring substantial local data caching without the premium cost of dedicated high-compute nodes. The hardware configuration and benchmark profile make this instance suitable for database operations, memory-intensive applications, local data processing, and moderate web serving workloads.
description: Microsoft Azure L16as_v3 is an x86_64 server instance in the LASv3 family, powered by an AMD EPYC 7763 processor. It features 16 dedicated vCPUs across 8 physical cores, operating at a clock speed of 3.525 GHz, and is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory alongside 4004 GB of Premium Storage capable local storage. Performance benchmarks show strong single-core CPU capabilities and strong text generation speeds for small language models, though multi-core performance is average and large-block memory write bandwidth is weak. With its high local storage capacity and balanced memory-to-core ratio, this virtual machine is optimized for database hosting, local data caching, and memory-intensive workloads. It runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, providing a secure and isolated environment for enterprise applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure L16as_v3 is a LASv3 family server featuring 16 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 128 GB of RAM, and 4004 GB of local storage, optimized for database and memory-intensive workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure L16as_v3 is a LASv3 server with 16 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 4004 GB local storage, designed for databases and caching.
tagline: An AMD-powered server featuring high-capacity local storage and balanced memory configuration for data-intensive and database workloads.

128.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core
